logic.value: Do your employees handle any type of product, prototypes, machinery, tools, etc?
What state are you incorporated in?

Current Payroll Report with deductions and YTD wages.

• Report should identify state, workers’ compensation class code, and annual wages

Workers’ Compensation Policy Declaration Page if available.

• If currently with a PEO, please provide most recent premium billing statement, or a report detailing payroll by class code and state

Three to five-year loss runs (valued within last 45-days).

• If company has been in business less than three years, or no workers’ compensation experience,

• Claims in excess of $25,000, require nature and detail of those claims.
Completed and signed RFP (Request for Proposal).
Made with Fillout, the easy way to make stunning forms
Is your mailing address the same as your physical address?
